name: pawcare-services
description: PawCare Microservices - Run all services together

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "AUTH,PRODUCT,POST,ACCOUNT,ORDER" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:post" "npm run dev:account" "npm run dev:order"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "AUTH,PRODUCT,POST,ACCOUNT,ORDER" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:post" "npm run start:account" "npm run start:order"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:auth && npm run install:product && npm run install:post && npm run install:account && npm run install:order
